name: Grazziotin S.A.
summary: Grazziotin S.A. engages in the retail business in Brazil. The company's stores offer footwear, sport products, beds, tables, bath and intimate line products, furniture, housing and bazaar items, watches, jewelries, perfumery and camping, construction and electrical materials, sanitary and hardware products, hunting and fishing items, and painting and fodder products, as well as clothing products for men, women, and children. It also engages in the growing and extraction of woods, as well as manages shopping centers. The company was founded in 1950 and is based in Passo Fundo, Brazil.
